title: Salty Velvety Slovakian Rice Stick Noodles Stir-fry
description: A decadent and indulgent dish featuring creamy rice stick noodles that are stir-fried to perfection with a salty base.
instructions: Heat peanut oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Beat the eggs into a smooth paste and add to the pan. Cook until fully set, then remove from heat.
Add sliced garlic and green onions to the pan. Stir-fry for about 1 minute.
Return the cooked egg mixture to the pan with the noodles, salt, and any additional seasonings you like (e.g., soy sauce or sesame oil).
Stir everything together until fully combined and heated through.
Top with cilantro leaves before serving.
